meta.title: Real World Burp Suite RCE PoC

div.h1: 🎯 BURP SUITE RCE - REAL WORLD PoC
div.p: Complete bypass of PortSwigger protections - Deployable anywhere
WebSocket connections bypass Local Network Access restrictions
WebSocket timing attacks identify Chrome DevTools ports
Brute force with realistic UUID patterns
This PoC will demonstrate the complete exploit chain in real-time
Target: Any Burp Suite Professional instance running on this machine
This is a REAL security vulnerability demonstration.
If Burp Suite Professional is running on this machine, this exploit will:

ul.li: Gain full Chrome DevTools Protocol access

p.strong: This demonstrates a critical security vulnerability.
